selectedTaskBefore.title: Cover clipboard and IDE handoff strategies with automated tests and explicit docs
selectedTaskBefore.notes: The current test plan explicitly leaves clipboard and VS Code command handoff behavior uncovered.

selectedTaskAfter.title: Cover clipboard and IDE handoff strategies with automated tests and explicit docs
selectedTaskAfter.notes: Added command-shell smoke coverage for prompt clipboard auto-copy plus Open Codex IDE clipboard-only, IDE-command, missing-command fallback, and cliExec-warning handoff paths, and documented the operator-facing handoff rules and remaining live-host gaps.
